title: Alex's Amazing PVP Pack
description: "Alex's Amazing PVP Pack" contains a mix of mods and texture packs that make the PVP experience WAY better.
body:
"Alex's Amazing PVP Pack" contains a mix of mods and texture packs that make the PVP experience WAY better. Optimization and QoL mods are the focus of the modpack, already set with the best video options for low-end PCs/laptops (it is advised to use V-Sync or limit the FPS between 60-120 if you have a really bad hardware that can barely run Minecraft). This modpack has custom keybinds, but you're free to change them.
We even have mods to make Optfine packs compatible and shader support.

We have:
- In-game datapcks and texture packs download
- Custom Hitbox (not models)
- Tiers (MCTiers, PvPTiers, Subtiers) on players name
- Replay Mod
- Favorite Worlds
- More Chat History
- Lunar Client-like widgets
- Smooth Chat
- Crosshair Indicator


This modpacks specifically contains:

+ Optimization mods:
	- BadOptimizations
	- Clumps
	- Concurrent Chunk Management Engine
	- Dynamic FPS
	- EntityCulling
	- FerriteCore
	- ImmediatelyFast
	- Krypton
	- Lithium
	- Particle Core
	- More Culling
	- No Telemetry
	- ScalableLux
	- Sodium/Sodium Extra/Reese's Sodium Options
	- Very Many Players

+ QoL mods:
	- AppleSkin
	- Better Advancements
	- Better Mount HUD
	- Better Ping Display
	- Better Statistic Screen
	- BetterF3
	- BetterHitbox
	- Boat Item View
	- Bobby 
	- Carpet Mod (fake players)
	- Chat Heads
	- ChatAnimation (like Lunar Client)
	- Cherished World
	- Crosshair Indicator
	- Fabrishot
	- Fadeless
	- Fast IP Ping
	- Fullbright
	- GUI Effect Timer
	- HerosAnchorOptimizer
	- How High is it? (mace damage)
	- Marlow's Crystal Optimizer
	- Mod Menu
	- Model Gap Fix
	- More Chat History
	- NetherPortalFix
	- No Chat Reports
	- Remove Reloading Screen (disable if texture packs get bugged)
	- Replay Mod
	- Resourcify
	- Shield Status & Fixes
	- Shulker Box Tooltip
	- Third Person Nametag
	- Tiers
	- TotemCounter
	- uku's Armor HUD
	- Widgets
	- Zoomify

+ PVP and QoL Packs (same order as in the game) (ignoring mods built-in packs)
	- Connected Ore Bordes + Connected Budding Amethyst
	- Simple Grass Flower
	- Cool Font 4
	- Low Fire
	- Low Shield
	- Daggers
	- Viual Armor Trims
	- Unique Dark
	- CPVP Essentials
	- Vanilla+
